items.title: Sanitized chat_responder import + parameterize ES connection target
items.rationale: Lift the existing chat_responder Python from noob-root VPS (presales_knowledge_expert + zoom_knowledge_expert), strip secrets, parameterize ES URL/index/auth via env vars. Add fake-ES fixture for unit tests so we can iterate without a real cluster.

items.title: /render?topic=X page-on-demand FastAPI route
items.rationale: Bot exposes /render?topic=X that queries ES for matching docs, prompts Claude haiku with the docs, renders HTML via Jinja, caches 5min in-memory LRU. No persistent frontend — page generated per request.

items.title: cw-gateway route contract test
items.rationale: Unit test that locks the bot's /render and /health JSON contracts against what cw-gateway expects. Doesn't deploy — just prevents drift.

items.title: systemd unit templates (dev + prod) with op:// EnvironmentFile refs
items.rationale: dev_es_bot.service and prod_es_bot.service. Secrets via op:// references documented in README, never committed. systemd-analyze --user verify validates locally before VPS deploy.

items.title: Deploy runbook with op:// → /etc/...env → systemctl flow
items.rationale: docs/DEPLOY.md with the manual sequence: pull secrets via op://, write /etc/es-bots/<env>.env, systemctl daemon-reload + start. Not auto-executed; admiral runs.

items.title: Per-bot ES query expansion config
items.rationale: Dev wants fuzzy search (broader recall while iterating); prod wants exact (stable behavior for live users). YAML config per env.

items.title: /health endpoint with ES + Claude + cache stats
items.rationale: Returns ES connection status, Claude API status (last-call latency), cache hit rate. Monitored by uptime watcher; cw-gateway uses it for routing health.

items.title: Log retention monitor + systemd journal rotation
items.rationale: Bot logs its own decisions (ES query, Claude prompt summary, cache hit/miss). systemd-journald-managed rotation; alert if log volume drops below baseline (silent failure signal).
